<?php namespace Aws\CloudTrailData; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS CloudTrail Data Service** service. * @method \Aws\Result putAuditEvents(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise putAuditEventsAsync(array $args = []) */ class CloudTrailDataClient extends AwsClient {}
